queue.title: Download Queue
queue.empty_hint: Submit a Steam Workshop URL above to begin downloading.

settings.title: Settings & Steam Auth
settings.auth_description: Logging in caches a persistence token (Sentry) locally inside your SteamCMD environment. Once authenticated, future downloads using this account will not prompt for a password.
settings.username_hint: Use "anonymous" to download open-access items without login.
settings.password_hint: Password is never saved. It is only sent to SteamCMD for the initial login handshake.

history.title: Download History
history.empty_hint: Completed downloads will be displayed here.

auth.title: Steam Guard Verification
auth.prompt: Your account requires approval. Please supply the Steam Guard code received via {type}.

alerts.invalid_username: Please enter a valid Steam Username (different from anonymous) to authenticate.
alerts.auth_success: Steam authentication completed successfully! Credentials cached in SteamCMD.
alerts.steamcmd_not_found: SteamCMD was not found at this location. Would you like to download and install it now?

status.login_init: Initiating SteamCMD login... Check logs below.
status.download_install: Downloading and installing SteamCMD Client... Please wait.
